name: Sammi Daewoo Bus Svc
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found for 'Sammi Daewoo Bus' or 'Sammi Daewoo' or 'Daewoo' across all variants. 'Sammi Daewoo' / 'Sammi Daewoo Express' is a large Pakistani bus operator (Lahore-headquartered) with no US/Colorado operations. The supplied address 2455 Bluff St, Boulder CO 80304 is a single-family residence (3BR/3BA built 2006) per Zillow/Redfin/Coldwell Banker MLS 9277869, not a bus terminal. No Colorado SOS entity confirmed. Likely a source-data error (probably misclassified/scraped Pakistani entity) rather than a real US student transportation operator. Recommend dropping from buyer universe.

name: National Charter Bus Jackson
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record for 'National Charter Bus' (or 'National Bus Charter'). National Charter Bus is a nationwide booking/broker brand (nationalbuscharter.com) that lists virtual local-presence pages (Jackson MS, Fort Worth TX, Washington DC, etc.) with a single 844-755-0510 phone — it does not own/operate the buses at the listed cities. Chamber listing shows local address 212 N Congress St, Jackson, MS 39201 and phone 601-948-7575, but this is a sales office/POP not a fleet yard. Not a student transportation operator. Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: National Charter Bus Fort WRTH
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record for 'National Charter Bus' (or 'National Bus Charter'). Same nationwide booking/broker brand as record 227 — nationalbuscharter.com Fort Worth virtual presence (single 844-755-0510 line, address listed only as 'Downtown Fort Worth, TX 76006'). Not a directly operating carrier and not a student transportation operator. Member of Colleyville Chamber of Commerce. Not a tuck-in candidate.

name: Trans4kids Shuttle Inc
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA record found for 'TRANS4KIDS' or 'TRANS4KIDS SHUTTLE' or 'TRANS 4 KIDS'. BBB profile confirms Trans4kids Shuttle, Inc. was incorporated 10/8/2008 in Cypress TX (P.O. Box 2458, Cypress TX 77410; street 7627 Pasture Bend Ln). President: Sophronia Beckford. Phone (281) 858-8726. Service: child/school shuttle to/from daycare and schools. BBB notes mail returned undeliverable 6/13/2016 and lists company as 'out of business'. D&B reported ~4 employees and ~$120K revenue. A separate 'Trans4kids LLC' (TX file 0802448486) exists in The Woodlands but appears to be a distinct, unrelated entity. Entity status presumed dissolved/inactive; not a viable tuck-in target.

name: Curl School Bus Svc
registry_source: Oregon Coast Bank customer story + Vernonia SD + chamber listings
notes: No SAFER/FMCSA carrier record returned for 'CURL SCHOOL BUS' or 'CURL' or 'CURL SCHOOL' — consistent with Oregon school bus contractors that operate intrastate-only and may be exempt from USDOT registration under the school-bus exemption for non-interstate operators. Family business: started in 1978 when Rob Curl's father and grandfather won the Vernonia School District 47J contract. Rob Curl purchased the company from his father in 2005. Per Oregon Coast Bank customer profile (2020), Curl School Bus Services operated 19 buses/vans with 16 employees; described as one of only three remaining small local OR school-bus contractors. Confirmed active in 2024-25 school year via Vernonia SD Facebook post. Addresses: 1960 N Mist Dr, Vernonia OR 97064 (input/yard); also PO Box 383, Vernonia OR. SBA PPP loan record exists under 'Curl School Bus Services Inc' (subchapter S corp). Strong tuck-in candidate (single-contract, family-owned, ~19 buses).
